feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ATC Configurator app F4712 - Target not found error
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to enable ATC configurator app in the BTP ABAP (Free tier) environment.  Followed the below help page to enable this app.  

Enable Usage of the ABAP Test Cockpit Configurator App | SAP Help Portal

The app is visible but on clicking on the app, it gives the below error.

Target was not found.Error: adding element with duplicate id 'nw.core.aps.atc.config::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport::configuration--action::'

Is there any other additional authorization to be added for this app to work?  If any of you have faced this and resolved this error.  

This is only happening for this app, other apps like ATC exemptions, Custom code migration app are working fine.

entry.title: BAS- can't connect my odata service developed with RAP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have subscribed to ABAP environment in my trial BTP and developed an OData service with RAP.
I would like to launch my app from BTP. I am following steps here https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-deploy-fiori-elements-ui.html

However I am stuck at step 5 point 4 where I can't find my odata service. I am connected to cloud foundry environment but I still can't see it. Can you please help.

Thanks and regards,
Jean Marc

entry.title: IDOC Type CREMAS05 is not updating VAT registration number (LFAS-STCEG)
entry.content:
Dear All,

  We have an idoc to update Vendor Master Data using Idoc type CREMAS05 . the issue is when we remove VAT Registration Number from XK02 -> Control Data -> VAT Reg No. Others button. We changed VAT Reg No ( LFAS-STCEG data) from XK02 and posted the idoc by tcode BD14. Idoc is posting successfully but this change is not reflecting in Target System.

Pls help if you have any input.

Thanks

Arpita

entry.title: SOA MANAGER setup for BP in ECC to CRM and vice visa
entry.content:
Hi team,

We have done SOAMANAGER setup between ECC to CRM.

We have done for Business partner scenario as per suggested SAP link .

Configuring SOA Manager for Business Partner | SAP Help Portal 

We have done the connection test in SOAMANAGER between the system and it works.

Issue is...we are not finding the respective Business PArtner service available in below path.

default-->sap-->bc-->srt-->pm

Do I need to do any additional setup or can i know how to bring the service of Business PArtner as mentioned below?

businesspartnerrelationshipsu1

businesspartnerrelationshipsui

businesspartnersuitebulkrepli1

Businesspartnersuitebulkreplic

Kindly suggest me the same.

Note : above mentioned service for BP not available in ECC and CRM though i have done complete step of SOAMANAGER in both the system.

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: SAP ABAP | SapScript Internal Table to Form
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

So I modified a sapscript form for check to be used in f-58 and FBZ5.

but the problem is I can't seem to pass an Internal Table values into the sapscipt form.

please refer to the pic below.

entry.title: default values when calling app or object page
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I have two apps.

In the first app, a user can create and maintain a Product data consisting of a header and n articles. The user can also create production runs which will be used in the second app to create the Product. 

As the second app focuses on one production run for one product, I created a new OData Model where I have a 1:1 relationship between header and production run. 

Both the header and child have an element "Storage Location". The requirement is now to preset the storage location (header and item) in the second app, depending on the selected Production run. 

Question is now, how can I preset/determine the storage location? As I don't want to display the Storage Location in the List View, the storage location must be determined at the latest when the object page is called.

 Does anyone know, how can I achieve this?

Thanks and Regards, Sebastian

entry.title: STVARV T-CODE
entry.content:
Hi Team

How to create custom table in STVARV t -CODE ?

I have to maintain customer user id for deletion  PO who is only deleted the PO LINE ITEM

 

Please suggest

entry.title: Unable to delete service instance for abap environment
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been using the trial account which was probably expired but now it has been extended. But the service key is not applicable anymore.

So I tried to create a new instance but even that was not successful. Moreover I am now unable to delete any of the instances

entry.title: How To read old Value after in RAP on BTP?
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I'm developing a service for article processing. The BO consists of 1 Header Article with n dependend Item Articles. A user can maintain the quantity of the articles. Now the requirement is, that the quantity of the items is recalculated when the user changes the quantity of the header article.

Example: header article (1 pc) item1 = 2 pc, item2 = 3 pc. Changing the header article to 2 pc -> item1 = 4 pc, item2 = 6 pc.

To recalculate the items, I need to know, the old header quantity, but how do I get this information?

Any Ideas?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: SAPUI5: create custom library to use across different apps across a sapui5 mta project.
entry.content:
I need to create a comprehensive SAPUI5 app with workflows and stuff. I have a create workflow and an approval workflow, both have the same forms. So in order to apply dry, I am trying to create a custom library in my sapui5 project. I want the components in the library to be accessed by any applications in my project(code reusability).
I have found answers like this
https://stackoverflow.com/questions/53635156/using-a-sapui5-library-in-another-project
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/step-by-step-procedure-to-create-sapui5-library-with-custom-controls-and/ba-p/13353169
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/6314fcd2510648fbaad3cee8a421030d.html
but couldn't find a complete solution. I guess there is a way to create a custom library from the cloud IDE itself.
If anyone can share any docs or guides on how to do it, would be really helpful.
The current project structure is attached. Next, I am gonna create an approval workflow so any help would be really helpful.

I found out that I can create a library with generator-easy-ui5 npm package, now I wanna know how to consume it in my apps.
Please check the folder structure I uploaded

entry.title: XBLNR Mass Change FBL3N
entry.content:
Hi All,
We have a requirement to mass update the Reference field (XBLNR) from FBL3N Transaction.

As XBLNR is a header field is it possible to achieve this requirement using SAP Note 640908.

Please help on this.

entry.title: ABAP on BTP Trial Instance creation is getting Failed
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create ABAP instance in BTP Trial account.I have tried deleting entire trial account. But nothing helps.

I am getting following error:

Service broker error: Service broker abap-trial-broker failed with: Internal Server Error.

 

Tried creating via Booster then deleted whole Subaccount ,Space everything again tried to creating through Service market place still failing,

I was able to create successfully two days back and today that instance was currently not available.So tried recreating and ended up getting failed.

 

 

 

 

Please help.

entry.title: OData Service for Goods movement Type Texts in S4
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm searching for an OData Service to receive the Goods Movement Type Texts (T156T) from S4. Couldn't find a service neither in S4 not in the Business Accelerator Hub. Anyone knows this service?

Thanks and Regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Fetch csv file from FTP/SFTP to S/4HANA via SAP BTP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have an scenario as mentioned below.

we want to fetch CSV file from SFTP server and transport the file to S/4HANA via the BTP Integration Suite.

File (SFTP) -> SAP CPI -> S4HANA .

Is there any detailed solution？

Thanks.

entry.title: Display a message from Custom Entity / Query Implementation Class?
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

In my application, I have a popup (abstract entity) with fields with value helps. the value help of field2 needs the value from field1. 

Is it possible to display a message (no exception message) like "Please maintain field xy first" when checking the import parameter in ther query class?

the only thing I could achive is raising an exception with a message message, which appears AFTER clicking the "Cancel" Button on the popup. The message should appear as a hint, without "An exception was raised" but most import, it should appear right after klicking the search help button and not after pressing the Cancel Button.

Every help is highly appreciated.

Thanks, Sebastian

entry.title: I have a ABAP select query, which I wanted to convert to CDS
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

I have a ABAP select query, which I wanted to convert into CDS .

SELECT *
      FROM zcds_view
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_tab)
      WHERE empid IN @s_id
        AND name IN @s_name.

Here zcds_view is already created CDS.

Another query, which needs to be converted to CDS, which requires another CDS and for all entries

SELECT emp_age, emp_dob
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_emp)
      FROM emp_detail
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_tab
      WHERE empid = @LT_tab-empid. 

 

Please suggest.
Thanks in Advance 

 

#CDS #SAP

entry.title: how to send a url image, pdf file, text file to AL11
entry.content: I got a requirement and in that I am getting attachement text from sales order and then I need to send it to AL11 and Could you please provide the steps to send url, image format, pdf file, to AL11 directory...I got the text attachment from sales order  into internal table. If it is image format or pdf file, url attachment then what is best way to send it to AL11 directory

entry.title: Connect SAP BTP to S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
I want to Deploy my Fiori app to Sap S4hana Public Cloud, I stuck in problem when try to create a Fiori app on SAP BAS
I am Follow this tutorials on SAP Developers, 

 Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials

I have done Step 2 and Step 3 

Communication system on SAP S4hana Cloud Side

 

Destination on SAP BTP Side 

Connection is fine 

My Problem:

I Think that there are any change in SAMLAssertion Authentication ? Because I have done this tutorial 5 months ago but now I'm facing the problem with same settings. The Error tell me that maybe my destination not works ? there are any setting that I'm missing

I'm waiting for yours solutions, 
Thanks

entry.title: sap system issue analysis by kernel snapshot analyzer tool
entry.content:
Overview

In this blog post, I've detailed the process of utilizing the SAP Kernel Snapshot Analyzer tool through the examination of server snapshots.

DISCLAIMER

The content of this blog post is provided “AS IS”. This information could contain technical inaccuracies, typographical errors, and out-of-date information. This document may be updated or changed without notice at any time. Use of the information is therefore at your own risk. In no event shall SAP be liable for special, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from or related to the use of this document.

Purpose           

This tool can be used for troubleshooting server issue kernel kernel-related issues.

Mainly tool used for dispatcher scheduler information, queue statistics, work process table, session table, work process call stacks, PROC memory consumption, and the root cause analysis for SAP Kernel-related issues.

Prerequisites

SAP NetWeaver Application Server ABAP is a feature available from SAP Kernel 740.

The application server can be configured to automatically or manually generate a dump of critical information when the system encounters abnormal situations, such as handling requests without progress. This dump includes vital details about the server's state and processes at the time of the incident.

SAP Kernel snapshot analysis steps: –

  • Generate snapshot
  • Download snapshot
  • Download kernel analyzer
  • Upload snapshot and generate kernel snapshot analysis report

Generate snapshot:-

SAP system snapshot can automatically be generated when WP unexpectedly finished, hard shutdown, exhausted resources, lack of WP, etc.

Manually generate snapshots via SAP GUI and via OS.

Snapshot generated via SAP GUI

SAP transaction: SM50 -> Administration->Snapshot -> Create

OS level generates snapshots

Run demon from OS and follow the below command to create the snapshot

m - menu -> p - work-process-adm-table -> e - create snapshot

 

Download snapshot

You can obtain the snapshot file from the SAP system, which is a compressed archive containing ample application server information for analysis. You can utilize the following method to download snapshot files:

SM50 -> Administration->Snapshot -> Administration

Select the snapshot and download it into Dashtop

You can download the snapshot files directly from the operating system

OS snapshot path:-  /usr/sap/<System ID>/SYS/global/sapcontrol/snapshots/

Download kernel analyzer

The Kernel Snapshot Analyzer is a specialized tool crafted for diagnosing abnormal behaviors within system snapshots. These snapshots can be sourced from the snapshot file or the work directory (developer traces) of the SAP system.

Before proceeding with the analysis, ensure that your system has the Java Runtime Environment (JRE) installed correctly. It's recommended to have at least JRE7 available.

To utilize the Kernel Snapshot Analyzer, follow these steps:

  1. Download the executable file KernelSnapshotAnalyzer.jar.
  2. Also, acquire the introduction slides for guidance.
  3. Once downloaded, run the KernelSnapshotAnalyzer.jar file on your local machine.

By running this tool, you can efficiently diagnose and address any anomalies present within the server snapshots, thereby ensuring optimal performance and stability of your SAP system.

Download the tool from the below link:-

Download kernel snapshot analyzer

 

Upload snapshot and generate kernel snapshot analysis report:-

Run KernelSnapshotAnalyzer.jar and upload the downloaded snapshot into the tool  

Like below:-

Run analysis report:- it will generate an XML report like below

C-call stacks for all types of work processes:

 

 

 

Detailed analysis available for all below points

 

Reference SAP Notes:-

 2640476 - How to analyze Server Snapshot with kernel snapshot analyzer.

 3110588 - Kernel Snapshot Analyzer: Central KBA

Advantages:-

  •     Helpful for troubleshooting unexpected shutdown
  •     Help for Call stacks related to all snapshot DIA processes
  •     Kernel parameters details and corrections if needed

 

I hope this document will help you with the sap kernel snapshot analyzer tool.

 

Cheers!

Anikesh Jyotishi

entry.title: Error when trying to create a package in Eclipe - ABAP Cloud BTP
entry.content:
Hello everybody,
I have the following error when trying to create a package in Eclipe connected to SAP BTP: System setting does not allow changes to be made to object DEVC.

Can someone help me please?

Thanks
